functions.name: test_provide_automatic_options_attr_disable
functions.docstring: Automatic options can be disabled by the view func attribute.

functions.name: test_provide_automatic_options_attr_enable
functions.docstring:
When default automatic options is disabled in config, it can still be
enabled by the view function attribute.

functions.name: test_provide_automatic_options_arg_disable
functions.docstring: Automatic options can be disabled by the route argument.

functions.name: test_provide_automatic_options_method_disable
functions.docstring: Automatic options is ignored if the route handles options.

functions.name: _standard_os_environ
functions.docstring:
Set up ``os.environ`` at the start of the test session to have
standard values. Returns a list of operations that is used by
:func:`._reset_os_environ` after each test.

functions.name: _reset_os_environ
functions.docstring:
Reset ``os.environ`` to the standard environ after each test,
in case a test changed something without cleaning up.

functions.name: leak_detector
functions.docstring:
Fails if any app contexts are still pushed when a test ends. Pops all
contexts so subsequent tests are not affected.

functions.name: modules_tmp_path
functions.docstring: A temporary directory added to sys.path.

functions.name: site_packages
functions.docstring: Create a fake site-packages.

functions.name: test_open_session_with_endpoint
functions.docstring:
If request.endpoint (or other URL matching behavior) is needed
while loading the session, RequestContext.match_request() can be
called manually.

functions.name: test_view_provide_automatic_options_attr_disable
functions.docstring: Automatic options can be disabled by the view class attribute.

functions.name: test_view_provide_automatic_options_attr_enable
functions.docstring:
When default automatic options is disabled in config, it can still be
enabled by the view class attribute.

functions.name: test_provide_automatic_options_method_disable
functions.docstring: Automatic options is ignored if the route handles options.

methods.name: test_handle_class_or_code
methods.docstring:
``InternalServerError`` and ``500`` are aliases, they should
have the same behavior. Both should only receive
``InternalServerError``, which might wrap another error.

methods.name: test_handle_generic_http
methods.docstring:
``HTTPException`` should only receive ``HTTPException``
subclasses. It will receive ``404`` routing exceptions.

methods.name: test_handle_generic
methods.docstring:
Generic ``Exception`` will handle all exceptions directly,
including ``HTTPExceptions``.

functions.name: test_jsonify_arrays
functions.docstring: Test jsonify of lists and args unpacking.

functions.name: test_jsonify_aware_datetimes
functions.docstring: Test if aware datetime.datetime objects are converted into GMT.

functions.name: test_jsonify_uuid_types
functions.docstring: Test jsonify with uuid.UUID types

functions.name: test_cli_name
functions.docstring: Make sure the CLI object's name is the app's name and not the app itself

functions.name: test_prepare_import
functions.docstring:
Expect the correct path to be set and the correct import and app names
to be returned.

:func:`prepare_exec_for_file` has a side effect where the parent directory
of the given import is added to :data:`sys.path`. This is reset after the
test runs.

functions.name: test_cli_blueprints
functions.docstring: Test blueprint commands register correctly to the application

functions.name: test_cli_empty
functions.docstring: If a Blueprint's CLI group is empty, do not register it.

functions.name: test_environbuilder_json_dumps
functions.docstring: EnvironBuilder.json_dumps() takes settings from the app.
